message.en:
Welcome to Postbank 👋
Please choose your language:
message.sw:
Karibu Postbank 👋
Tafadhali chagua lugha yako:

message.en:
How can I assist you today?

Please select a service below to continue.
message.sw:
Nawezaje kukusaidia vipi leo?

Chagua huduma hapa chini kuendelea.

message.en: What would you like help with?
message.sw: Ungependa msaada gani?

message.en:
To open a Savings Account, please bring:
• Original ID/Passport
• KRA PIN
• Minimum opening balance
Visit your nearest branch.
message.sw:
Ili kufungua Akaunti ya Akiba, tafadhali leta:
• Kitambulisho halisi au Pasipoti
• Nambari ya KRA PIN
• Kiasi cha chini cha kufungua akaunti
Tembelea tawi lililo karibu nawe.

message.en: To open a HELB Account, visit your nearest Postbank branch with your birth certificate and parent/guardian’s ID.
message.sw: Ili kufungua Akaunti ya HELB, tembelea tawi la Postbank lililo karibu na kitambulisho chako na cha mzazi/mlezi.

message.en:
To open a Company Account, bring:
• Director IDs/photos
• Company registration docs
• KSh 5,000 minimum balance
• KSh 1,800 search fee
Visit the branch.
message.sw:
Ili kufungua Akaunti ya Kampuni, leta:
• Kitambulisho / Picha za Wakurugenzi
• Hati za usajili wa kampuni
• Salio la chini KSh 5,000
• Ada ya KSh 1,800
Tembelea tawi.

message.en: A dormant account can be reactivated by visiting the nearest branch and completing activation forms. You may also deposit via Paybill 200999.
message.sw: Akaunti iliyokwisha inaweza kufufuliwa kwa kutembelea tawi lililo karibu na kujaza fomu za ufafanuzi. Unaweza pia kuweka fedha kupitia Paybill 200999.

message.en: For SAYE account payments or benefits, please let us know which institution you expect your payment from so we can assist further.
message.sw: Kwa malipo au faida za akaunti ya SAYE, tafadhali tueleze taasisi unayotarajia malipo kutoka ili tuweze kusaidia zaidi.

message.en: Your account number is the 13-digit number above your name on your debit card. You can also dial *498# on mobile banking or email info@postbank.co.ke with your ID and name.
message.sw: Namba yako ya akaunti ni namba ya tarakimu 13 iliyo juu ya jina lako kwenye kadi ya debit. Pia unaweza piga *498# kwenye huduma ya simu au tuma barua pepe info@postbank.co.ke pamoja na kitambulisho na jina lako.

message.en: Mobile Banking options:
message.sw: Chaguzi za Huduma ya Simu:

message.en: To self-register for mobile banking, dial *498# on your phone and follow the prompts. If you experience errors, visit your nearest branch.
message.sw: Ili kujisajili kwa huduma ya simu, piga *498# kwenye simu yako na fuata maelekezo. Ikiwa utapata makosa, tembelea tawi lililo karibu.

message.en: Too many incorrect PIN attempts can block your access. Visit the nearest branch for PIN reset or assistance.
message.sw: Jaribio la PIN zisizo sahihi mara nyingi linaweza kuzuia akaunti yako. Tembelea tawi lililo karibu kwa urejeshaji wa PIN au msaada.

message.en: ‘Invalid Device’ errors usually occur after SIM or phone replacement due to IMSI mismatch. Please visit your branch to resolve.
message.sw: Makosa ya ‘Kifaa Kisicho Sahihi’ hutokea baada ya kubadilisha SIM au simu kutokana na kutofautiana kwa IMSI. Tafadhali tembelea tawi lako ili kutatua.

message.en: Download the Postbank mobile app from the Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.eclectic.rnd.postbank
message.sw: Pakua app ya Postbank kutoka Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.eclectic.rnd.postbank

message.en: Cards & ATM options:
message.sw: Chaguzi za Kadi & ATM:

message.en: If you forgot your ATM PIN or need a reset, please visit the nearest branch.
message.sw: Kama umepoteza PIN ya ATM au unahitaji kurekebisha, tafadhali tembelea tawi lililo karibu.

message.en: Maximum daily ATM withdrawal is KSh 40,000. Requests for higher limits can be made at your branch.
message.sw: Kiwango cha juu cha kutoa pesa kwa siku kwenye ATM ni KSh 40,000. Maombi ya kuongeza kikomo yanaweza kufanywa kwenye tawi.

message.en: ATM cards are usually processed instantly; fee is KSh 600. Other fees include ATM KSh 40, Over the counter KSh 70, Mobile banking KSh 50–60, PIN re-issue KSh 168.
message.sw: Kadi za ATM huchakatwa mara moja; ada ni KSh 600. Ada nyingine ni ATM KSh 40, Over the counter KSh 70, Huduma ya simu KSh 50–60, PIN re-issue KSh 168.

message.en: If your card is withheld or lost, report to the nearest branch for assistance.
message.sw: Kama kadi yako imekamatwa au imepotea, ripoti kwenye tawi lililo karibu kwa msaada.

message.en: Transfers options:
message.sw: Chaguzi za Uhamisho wa Fedha:

message.en: To transfer from your Postbank account to M-Pesa, register for Mobile Banking, dial *498#, and follow the prompts. (Excludes SAYE, SMATA, and Premium Plus accounts.)
message.sw: Ili kuhamisha kutoka akaunti yako ya Postbank kwenda M-Pesa, jisajili kwa Huduma ya Simu, piga *498# na fuata maelekezo. (Haijumuishi akaunti za SAYE, SMATA, na Premium Plus.)

message.en:
Deposit via Paybill 200999:
• Account: your 13-digit account number on ATM card
• Amount
• M-Pesa PIN
message.sw:
Amana kupitia Paybill 200999:
• Akaunti: namba yako ya tarakimu 13 kwenye kadi ya ATM
• Kiasi
• PIN ya M-Pesa

message.en:
To initiate a SWIFT transfer to Postbank, provide:
• Incoming bank: Citibank N.A (Nairobi), Bank Code 16000, Account 0300030106
• Beneficiary: Kenya Post Office Savings Bank
• Customer name & account number
message.sw:
Ili kuanzisha uhamisho wa SWIFT kwenda Postbank, toa:
• Benki inayotuma: Citibank N.A (Nairobi), Bank Code 16000, Akaunti 0300030106
• Mfaidika: Kenya Post Office Savings Bank
• Jina la mteja & namba ya akaunti

message.en: If you sent money to the wrong number/account, contact Customer Care: 0716918999 / 0734856353 or email info@postbank.co.ke for reversal assistance.
message.sw: Kama umehamisha pesa kwenda namba/akaunti isiyo sahihi, wasiliana na Huduma kwa Wateja: 0716918999 / 0734856353 au tuma barua pepe info@postbank.co.ke kwa msaada wa kurekebisha.

message.en: Branches & Hours options:
message.sw: Chaguzi za Matawi & Saa za Kufanya Kazi:

message.en:
Mon–Fri: 8:30am–4:00pm
Saturday: 8:30am–12:30pm
Closed on Sundays & public holidays. ATMs available 24/7.
message.sw:
Jumatatu–Ijumaa: 8:30am–4:00pm
Jumamosi: 8:30am–12:30pm
Zimefungwa Jumapili & sikukuu. ATM zinapatikana 24/7.

message.en: Loan options:
message.sw: Chaguzi za Mikopo:

message.en: Currently, credit services are limited to pensioners. Updates will be shared when offerings expand.
message.sw: Kwa sasa, huduma za mkopo zinalengwa kwa wastaafu tu. Taarifa mpya zitatolewa baada ya upanuzi.

message.en: More options:
message.sw: Chaguzi Zaidi:

message.en: Currently no job openings. Internships offered quarterly via HR: hr@postbank.co.ke or submit at Postbank House, 4th floor.
message.sw: Kwa sasa hakuna nafasi za kazi. Mafunzo hufanyika kila robo mwaka kupitia HR: hr@postbank.co.ke au wasilisha Postbank House, ghorofa ya 4.

message.en: For complaints or feedback, share details and your phone number. Our team will follow up to improve services.
message.sw: Kwa malalamiko au maoni, tuma maelezo na namba yako ya simu. Timu yetu itafuatilia ili kuboresha huduma.

message.en: Thank you for using Postbank chatbot. Have a great day! 👋
message.sw: Asante kwa kutumia chatbot ya Postbank. Kuwa na siku njema! 👋
